guide_response.verdict: SUPPLEMENT_2_BOUND -- LA rejected the standalone-PowerShell + paste-relay-for-hours workflow encoded in g8-ea8_n1(a) and the init pointer's `` as high-friction over-engineering. New ack g8-ea8_n2 with 6 sub-clauses (a-f) bound. Net change: Item 4.0 NARROWED to vikunja_mcp-only process kill (drop Claude/Code Stop-Process; rely on LA prep-2 manual-close attestation); CC-1 self-termination cascade addressed by narrowed kill instead of shell isolation; n1(a) SUPERSEDED by n2(b); Item 4.7 S4U handling REFINED to ~1-paste-relay carve-out instead of hard throw; LA prep-3 reframed as on-demand-at-4.7 instead of throughout-Stage-4; EA-8 surface restored to native VS Code Copilot Opus 4.7 agent mode with integrated terminal execution. g8-ea8_n1 sub-clauses (b, c, d, e, f, g, i, j, k, l, m, n, o, p) UNCHANGED; only (a) superseded and (h) Step 4 refined. PROCEED authorization unchanged: pending revised init pointer + LA pre-prep + LA-explicit "go" signal.

summary.trigger_context:
Lead Architect rejected the standalone-PowerShell + paste-relay workflow encoded in: - g8-ea8_n1(a) — base verdict's "EA-8 MUST execute Stage 4 from a STANDALONE PowerShell console" + descended-from-Claude/Code preflight gate - Init pointer `` — "EA-8's chat session is in VS Code Copilot but its work-execution shell is the standalone PowerShell" - Init pointer `` prep-3 — "Standalone elevated PowerShell ready" (throughout-Stage-4) - Init pointer `` — "EA-8 SHALL execute Stage 4 from a STANDALONE PowerShell console (Win+X → Windows Terminal or PowerShell), NOT from inside the VS Code Copilot chat's integrated terminal"
LA-stated reasoning (verbatim): "The standalone PowerShell + paste-relay-for-hours workflow is rejected as high-friction over-engineering. Real constraint: Item 4.0 needs to release MCP server processes (vikunja_mcp pythons). The Claude/Code Stop-Process sweep is REDUNDANT with prep-2 manual close — kill of already-closed processes is no-op; kill of EA-8's still-open VS Code is the self-termination problem."
Insight: the CC-1 self-termination cascade is caused by the Stop-Process Claude/Code sweep being TOO BROAD, not by EA-8 running in VS Code Copilot. NARROW the kill to just vikunja_mcp pythons (the actual constraint), and CC-1 disappears without needing shell isolation.
Cost-benefit: ~4-12 hours of LA paste-relay friction eliminated for the cost of one verdict cycle.
summary.approach:
Supplement-2 verdict pattern (mirrors supplement-1; cumulative-ack inheritance vehicle): introduces NEW ack g8-ea8_n2 with 6 sub-clauses (a-f) WITHOUT re-authoring base verdict (2c6be78) or supplement-1 (134e17a). g8-ea8_n2 sub-clauses SUPERSEDE n1(a) and REFINE n1(h) Step 4; all other n1 sub-clauses (b, c, d, e, f, g, i, j, k, l, m, n, o, p) UNCHANGED.
The init pointer file (committed at 9d5fcd8 by Guide-#8 the same session) IS revised in the same docs-only commit as this supplement-2 — the init pointer is a procedural pointer authored by Guide-#8 (NOT a verdict; not subject to no-amend doctrine). EA-8 has not yet spawned, so the init pointer is in pre-spawn state and editable. The revision folds in all n2 amendments so EA-8 reads ONE coherent init pointer + 3 verdict files (base + supplement-1 + supplement-2) rather than navigating cross-file overrides.
Cumulative-ack chain post-supplement-2: g7-ea1_n10..n13(a-h) + g7-ea7_n14(a-d) + g8-ea8_n1(a-p) + g8-ea8_n2(a-f). Total ack labels: 77 (was 76). Total binding atoms (sub-clauses expanded): 104 (was 98).
summary.findings_disposition_overview: - Item 4.0 narrowing (n2(a)): drop Stop-Process -Name "Claude","Code"; keep only vikunja_mcp python kill. Verify prep-2 honored via Get-Process Claude empty check. - n1(a) supersession (n2(b)): drop self-termination preflight gate. EA-8 runs in VS Code Copilot agent mode normally. - Item 4.7 S4U paste-relay carve-out (n2(c)): instead of hard throw on non-elevated shell, EA-8 emits the Unregister+Register block + asks LA to run from on-demand elevated shell + pastes result back. ~1 paste-relay only. - Prep-3 reframing (n2(d)): elevated PowerShell on-demand at Item 4.7 instead of throughout Stage 4. - Surface directives update (n2(e)): EA-8 uses VS Code Copilot agent mode terminal execution. Subagents still NOT available. - Action 4 iter-1 gate update (n2(f)): drop standalone-PowerShell confirmation; confirm VS Code Copilot agent mode + Item 4.0 narrowed kill.
summary.residual_risk_acknowledgment:
Coverage estimate post-supplement-2: ~85% (was ~83%). Supplement-2 closes the LA-workflow-friction gap and the CC-1 self-termination cascade more elegantly. Stage 4 risk profile unchanged on the destructive cutover axes; LA-workflow axis materially improved.
One residual workflow-risk INTRODUCED by n2: at Item 4.7 S4U paste-relay, EA-8 must reliably detect non-elevated shell + emit the EXACT Unregister+Register block + handle LA's pasted-back result. Per n2(c) explicit handling: EA-8 emits a single-purpose paste-template + verifies result via Get-ScheduledTaskInfo round-trip. Risk classification: LOW (one paste-relay vs hours of paste-relay).

subclause.title: Item 4.0 NARROWING — vikunja_mcp-only kill; drop Claude/Code Stop-Process sweep
subclause.root_cause: Stage 4 XML Item 4.0's `Get-Process -Name "Claude","Code" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force` is BROADER than necessary. Item 4.0's actual functional requirement is to release any python processes holding the vikunja_mcp module loaded (so the file system can be safely modified at Items 4.4-4.6 MCP repointing). Killing Claude Desktop + VS Code surfaces is redundant with LA prep-2 manual-close attestation AND introduces CC-1 self-termination cascade for EA-8 running in VS Code Copilot.
subclause.verify: Post-Item-4.0 verify (in addition to Step 3 above): ```powershell Get-Process -Name "Claude" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue # expected: empty Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name = 'python.exe'" | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -match 'vikunja_mcp' } # expected: empty Get-Process -Name "Code" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, ProcessName | Measure-Object # informational; expect ≥1 (EA-8's own VS Code is alive — that's the entire point of n2) ```

subclause.title: Supersede g8-ea8_n1(a) — drop standalone-PowerShell requirement + descended-from-Claude/Code preflight gate
subclause.root_cause: g8-ea8_n1(a) was authored to PREVENT the CC-1 cascade by isolating EA-8 from the Stop-Process Claude/Code sweep. With n2(a) narrowing the kill to vikunja_mcp-only, the CC-1 cascade is closed at the kill-source instead of via shell isolation. EA-8 can run natively in VS Code Copilot agent mode without self-termination risk.
subclause.amendment:
SUPERSESSION: g8-ea8_n1(a) is SUPERSEDED. EA-8 does NOT execute the n1(a) self-termination preflight gate. EA-8 does NOT run from a standalone PowerShell console.
Per no-amend doctrine on committed audit artifacts, n1(a)'s text in base verdict 2c6be78 is NOT retroactively rewritten. n1(a) remains in the cumulative-ack chain restatement (EA-8 restates it verbatim in iter-1 gate) but with status `SUPERSEDED-BY-g8-ea8_n2(b)` annotated. EA-8's iter-1 gate confirms n1(a) supersession explicitly.
Operational consequence: EA-8 runs Stage 4 entirely from VS Code Copilot Opus 4.7 agent mode using the integrated terminal for command execution. No standalone PowerShell console required. Item 4.0 NARROWED kill (per n2(a)) leaves EA-8's VS Code parent process alive.
Audit-trail consequence: the SUPERSEDED status of n1(a) is documented in this supplement-2 + cross-referenced in the Stage 4 STATUS append at Item 4.13.

subclause.title: Item 4.7 S4U paste-relay carve-out — refines g8-ea8_n1(h) Step 4
subclause.root_cause: g8-ea8_n1(h) Step 4 instructs EA-8 to throw on non-elevated shell at the `Agents Cadence Monitor` (S4U LogonType) Unregister/Register, suspending the per-task loop and requiring LA to spawn a separate elevated shell. With LA prep-3 reframed as on-demand (n2(d)) instead of throughout-Stage-4, EA-8 needs a controlled paste-relay flow rather than a hard throw.
subclause.amendment:
REFINEMENT to g8-ea8_n1(h) Step 4: replace hard-throw + per-task-loop-suspend with an explicit paste-relay carve-out. ~1 paste-relay total (not hours).
EA-8 execution at Item 4.7 when reaching `Agents Cadence Monitor`:
```powershell # n2(c) paste-relay carve-out (refines n1(h) Step 4) if ($name -eq 'Agents Cadence Monitor') { $isAdmin = ([Security.Principal.WindowsPrincipal][Security.Principal.WindowsIdentity]::GetCurrent()).IsInRole([Security.Principal.WindowsBuiltInRole]::Administrator) if (-not $isAdmin) { # Emit the EXACT block LA must run from a separately-launched elevated PowerShell. # EA-8 pauses, posts the block to LA chat, awaits LA's pasted result, verifies, resumes. $rewrittenXmlPath = "C:\Users\mrbla\backups\scheduled_tasks_export\updated\Agents Cadence Monitor.xml" Write-Host "============================================================" Write-Host "PASTE-RELAY REQUIRED: Agents Cadence Monitor (S4U LogonType)" Write-Host "============================================================" Write-Host "EA-8 cannot Unregister/Register S4U tasks from non-elevated shell." Write-Host "LA action required: open ON-DEMAND elevated PowerShell (Win+X -> 'Windows PowerShell (Admin)'), paste the block below, paste result back to EA-8 chat." Write-Host "" Write-Host "----- LA-EXECUTE-IN-ELEVATED-SHELL -----" Write-Host "Unregister-ScheduledTask -TaskName 'Agents Cadence Monitor' -TaskPath '\BlarAI\' -Confirm:`$false -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue" Write-Host "Register-ScheduledTask -Xml (Get-Content '$rewrittenXmlPath' -Raw) -TaskName 'Agents Cadence Monitor' -TaskPath '\BlarAI\' | Out-Null" Write-Host "Disable-ScheduledTask -TaskName 'Agents Cadence Monitor' -TaskPath '\BlarAI\' | Out-Null" Write-Host "Get-ScheduledTask -TaskName 'Agents Cadence Monitor' -TaskPath '\BlarAI\' | Select-Object TaskName, State, @{n='LogonType';e={(`$_ | Get-ScheduledTaskInfo).Principal.LogonType}}" Write-Host "----- END LA-EXECUTE -----" Write-Host "" Write-Host "Expected verify output (last command):" Write-Host " TaskName State LogonType" Write-Host " ---- ----- ---------" Write-Host " Agents Cadence Monitor Disabled S4U" Write-Host "" Write-Host "Paste verify output back to EA-8 chat. EA-8 will confirm + resume per-task loop." Write-Host "============================================================"
# EA-8 records the paste-relay state; awaits LA response; verifies on resumption. $errors += [PSCustomObject]@{ Task = $name; Status = 'PASTE_RELAY_PENDING'; Message = 'LA-elevated Unregister/Register required; EA-8 paused awaiting LA paste-back' }
# Pause the per-task loop here. EA-8 chat returns to LA with the paste-relay request. # On LA's paste-back: EA-8 verifies the LA-pasted output matches expected (Agents Cadence Monitor present + State=Disabled + LogonType=S4U), records SATISFIED status, resumes per-task loop with the next task. return # exit the foreach iteration; EA-8 chat awaits LA paste-back before resuming } } ```
Then, after all other tasks processed, EA-8 chat reports completion + lists `Agents Cadence Monitor` in `PASTE_RELAY_PENDING` state. EA-8 awaits LA paste-back of verify output. Upon receipt: ```powershell # EA-8 verifies LA-pasted output: # Expected pattern in LA's pasted output: 'Agents Cadence Monitor.*Disabled.*S4U' # If matched: mark SATISFIED, proceed to Item 4.8. # If not matched: report mismatch to LA, request re-execution or escalation. ```
Single paste-relay total. EA-8 stays in VS Code Copilot agent mode. LA opens on-demand elevated PowerShell briefly (Win+X → admin), pastes one block, pastes result back, closes elevated PowerShell.
Cascade impact: if EA-8's shell IS elevated at Item 4.7 (LA optionally elected to launch EA-8 from elevated, though n2(d) does not require it), the n2(c) Step 4 guard's `if (-not $isAdmin)` branch doesn't trigger — Unregister/Register runs in-process, no paste-relay needed. n2(c) preserves the "elevated runs cleanly; non-elevated falls back to paste-relay" semantics.

subclause.title: Reframe LA pre-prep prep-3 — elevated PowerShell on-demand at Item 4.7, not throughout Stage 4
subclause.root_cause: Init pointer's prep-3 attestation required LA to launch a standalone elevated PowerShell that would be open throughout Stage 4 (4-12 hours). With n2(a) narrowing Item 4.0 kill + n2(b) superseding standalone-shell requirement + n2(c) introducing paste-relay carve-out, prep-3 elevation requirement collapses to "LA opens elevated PowerShell ON-DEMAND when paste-relay is requested at Item 4.7" — a brief tactical action, not a sustained operational state.
subclause.amendment:
REFRAMING of LA pre-prep checklist prep-3. Replacement attestation:
``` prep-3 (REVISED): elevated PowerShell ON-DEMAND for Item 4.7 paste-relay.
LA action: confirm capability to launch an elevated PowerShell on-demand when EA-8 requests it at Item 4.7 paste-relay carve-out. LA does NOT need to keep an elevated shell open during the rest of Stage 4. The on-demand action is: Win+X -> "Windows PowerShell (Admin)" or "Terminal (Admin)" -> paste the EA-8-emitted Unregister+Register block -> paste result back to EA-8 chat -> close elevated PowerShell.
Verify capability (one-time, before EA-8 spawn): - Press Win+X. Confirm "Windows PowerShell (Admin)" or "Terminal (Admin)" option visible. - Right-click Start Menu. Confirm same options visible. - User account is part of Administrators group (verify via control panel User Accounts).
LA attestation line: "[ATTESTATION prep-3 REVISED] Elevated PowerShell on-demand capability confirmed. Win+X -> Admin shell available. User in Administrators group." ```
EA-8 surface remains VS Code Copilot Opus 4.7 agent mode throughout Stage 4. Elevation is a paste-relay-tactical action only.

subclause.title: Update init pointer surface directives — VS Code Copilot agent mode is canonical execution surface
subclause.root_cause: Init pointer's `` block established standalone-PowerShell as the canonical execution surface and treated VS Code Copilot agent mode as a chat-only relay layer. With n2(b) supersession + n2(a) narrowing, VS Code Copilot agent mode IS the canonical execution surface (chat + integrated terminal in one).
subclause.amendment:
REFRAMING of `` block. Replacement content (init pointer revision):
``` EA-8 runs in VS Code Copilot Chat with Claude Opus 4.7, AGENT MODE. The integrated terminal is the canonical execution surface for all Stage 4 commands. EA-8 invokes PowerShell commands directly through the integrated terminal (no paste-relay to a separate shell except for the n2(c) Item 4.7 S4U carve-out where on-demand elevated PowerShell is required for that one task).
Tool surface available: - Read tool (file inspection) - Edit tool (in-place file modification) - Write tool (new file creation) - Terminal: PowerShell (Windows; canonical for Stage 4) AND Bash (Unix-style; available) - Git via terminal - REST via Invoke-RestMethod (PowerShell) — REQUIRED for Item 4.3 Vikunja query post-Item-4.0 vikunja_mcp kill - mcp__vikunja__* tools — UNAVAILABLE between Item 4.0 (vikunja_mcp kill) and Item 4.11a (smoke). EA-8 must NOT assume MCP availability post-Item-4.0.
Tool surface NOT available: - Agent tool / subagent spawning. Guide-#8 (in Claude Code) handles subagents (e.g., Stage 4 close three-subagent verification triad). EA-8 does NOT spawn subagents.
Item 4.0 narrowed kill (per g8-ea8_n2(a)): - Verifies LA prep-2 attestation (Get-Process Claude empty) - Kills only vikunja_mcp python processes (releases file locks for Items 4.4-4.6 MCP repointing) - Does NOT touch Claude/Code processes (LA pre-closed those per prep-2) - EA-8's own VS Code Copilot session stays alive throughout — that's the entire point of n2
Item 4.7 S4U paste-relay carve-out (per g8-ea8_n2(c)): - For `Agents Cadence Monitor` only (the one S4U LogonType task in the 13-task fleet) - EA-8 detects non-elevated shell, emits the exact Unregister+Register block to LA chat, asks LA to run from on-demand elevated PowerShell, awaits LA paste-back of verify output - One paste-relay total. All other 12 tasks at Item 4.7 + all of Items 4.8/4.9/4.10/4.11a/4.12/4.13/4.13.5 run in-process via VS Code Copilot integrated terminal
Pragmatic Item 4.0 interpretation (REVISED per n2(a)): - LA prep-2 attestation closed all OTHER AI surfaces BEFORE EA-8 spawn. Item 4.0 verifies via Get-Process Claude empty check. - Item 4.0 vikunja_mcp kill releases python processes holding the MCP module loaded (so file locks on tools/vikunja_mcp/ release for Items 4.4-4.6 rewrites). - EA-8's own VS Code Copilot session is preserved (not killed by the narrowed Item 4.0). - The Stage 4 XML's literal Item 4.0 Stop-Process Claude,Code command is REPLACED by the n2(a) narrowed kill. EA-8 runs the n2(a) version, not the spec's literal version. ```
This replaces the entire prior `` block in the init pointer.

subclause.title: Update init pointer iter-1 gate emission — drop standalone-PowerShell check; confirm VS Code Copilot agent mode + narrowed kill
subclause.root_cause: Init pointer's `` action 4 (emit iter-1 comprehension gate) instructed EA-8 to confirm running in standalone PowerShell. With n2(a)/(b)/(e), the iter-1 gate confirmation pivots: EA-8 confirms running in VS Code Copilot agent mode AND confirms Item 4.0 will use n2(a) narrowed kill.
subclause.amendment:
REFRAMING of init pointer `` action 4 surface-confirmation text. Replacement content:
EA-8's iter-1 gate `comprehension_summary` block adds a `part_g_surface_confirmation` field:
``` part_g_surface_confirmation: "Confirming EA-8 runs in VS Code Copilot Opus 4.7 agent mode. Integrated terminal is the canonical execution surface for Stage 4 commands. Item 4.0 will use the g8-ea8_n2(a) NARROWED kill (verify LA prep-2 via Get-Process Claude empty + kill vikunja_mcp pythons via Get-CimInstance), NOT the spec's broader Stop-Process Claude,Code command. g8-ea8_n1(a) self-termination preflight gate is SUPERSEDED-BY-g8-ea8_n2(b) — EA-8 does NOT run that gate. Standalone PowerShell is NOT required for Stage 4 work; on-demand elevated PowerShell is required only at Item 4.7 paste-relay for Agents Cadence Monitor (S4U LogonType) per g8-ea8_n2(c)." ```
Also: drop V0m elevation check from V0a-V0o pickup verification (since elevation is no longer required throughout Stage 4 per n2(d)). V0m is REMOVED. Renumber V0n→V0m, V0o→V0n. Total V0 checks: 14 (was 15).

relationship_to_prior_g8_ea8_n1_sub_clau.unchanged_sub_clauses: The following g8-ea8_n1 sub-clauses are UNCHANGED by this supplement-2: - n1(b) Item 4.0.6 absolute-path state.json gate — UNCHANGED - n1(c) Item 4.1 LA-decided 6-step DB location verify + config absolutize — UNCHANGED - n1(d) Item 4.2 post-startup verification triad — UNCHANGED - n1(e) Item 4.3 VIKUNJA_TOKEN handling (Parts 0/1/2/3) — UNCHANGED - n1(f) Item 4.4 Claude Desktop MCP rewrite (3 fields) — UNCHANGED - n1(g) Items 4.5/4.6 VS Code + Claude Code MCP rewrite — UNCHANGED - n1(h) Item 4.7 shape-aware arg-injection (Steps 1, 2, 3, 5, 6) — UNCHANGED. Only Step 4 S4U guard refined by n2(c). - n1(i) Item 4.7.5 wake-template forward-slash siblings — UNCHANGED - n1(j) Item 4.7.7 Vikunja autostart noise suppression — UNCHANGED - n1(k) Item 4.9 Startup .lnk + .vbs rewrite — UNCHANGED - n1(l) Item 4.11 EA/LA smoke split — UNCHANGED - n1(m) Item 4.12 commit hygiene — UNCHANGED - n1(n) Item 4.13.5 two-step reset+resume — UNCHANGED - n1(o) Item 4.4 filesystem MCP expansion — UNCHANGED - n1(p) Item 4.4 trustedFolders expansion — UNCHANGED
relationship_to_prior_g8_ea8_n1_sub_clau.superseded_or_refined: - n1(a) Item 4.0 self-termination preflight gate — SUPERSEDED-BY-n2(b). EA-8 restates n1(a) verbatim in iter-1 gate but with status `SUPERSEDED-BY-g8-ea8_n2(b)` annotated; EA-8 does NOT execute n1(a). Operationally replaced by n2(a) narrowed Item 4.0 kill. - n1(h) Step 4 S4U guard — REFINED-BY-n2(c). Steps 1, 2, 3, 5, 6 of n1(h) UNCHANGED. Step 4 replaced with paste-relay carve-out. EA-8 restates n1(h) verbatim in iter-1 gate but with Step 4 status `REFINED-BY-g8-ea8_n2(c)` annotated.

forward_carry_unchanged.ex_items: EX-1 (Vikunja DB-path runtime verification mid-cutover), EX-2 (VIKUNJA_TOKEN auth fallback documentation), EX-3 (S4U elevation handling) — EX-3 update: now operationally satisfied via n2(c) paste-relay carve-out instead of LA-spawns-elevated-shell-before-Stage-4. EX-3 documentation updates accordingly.
forward_carry_unchanged.stage_6_7_5_tickets: TICKETS A through G UNCHANGED. No new tickets from this supplement-2.

required_acknowledgments.preamble: EA-8 must acknowledge in iter-1 comprehension gate response the FULL set: base verdict + supplement-1 + supplement-2 + LA-relayed init-pointer-revision directive.
required_acknowledgments.ack_to_emit_at_start_of_ea_8_iter_1_gate:
Base verdict §required_acknowledgments items (a) through (i) UNCHANGED. Supplement-1 §required_acknowledgments additions (j) through (o) UNCHANGED. Supplement-2-induced additions:
(p) g8-ea8_n2(a) verbatim per §new_sub_clauses above. Item 4.0 NARROWED kill (vikunja_mcp-only; verify prep-2 via Get-Process Claude empty).
(q) g8-ea8_n2(b) verbatim. n1(a) SUPERSEDED. EA-8 runs in VS Code Copilot agent mode. n1(a) in iter-1 gate restatement annotated `SUPERSEDED-BY-g8-ea8_n2(b)`.
(r) g8-ea8_n2(c) verbatim. n1(h) Step 4 REFINED to paste-relay carve-out. n1(h) in iter-1 gate restatement annotated `Step 4 REFINED-BY-g8-ea8_n2(c)`.
(s) g8-ea8_n2(d) verbatim. LA pre-prep prep-3 reframed: elevated PowerShell on-demand at Item 4.7, not throughout Stage 4. EA-8's iter-1 gate `la_pre_prep_attestation_recap` confirms the REVISED prep-3 attestation line.
(t) g8-ea8_n2(e) verbatim. EA-8 surface = VS Code Copilot Opus 4.7 agent mode + integrated terminal. Subagents NOT available.
(u) g8-ea8_n2(f) verbatim. iter-1 gate `comprehension_summary` adds `part_g_surface_confirmation` field. V0m elevation check REMOVED; total V0 checks = 14.
(v) Cumulative-ack chain count: 77 ack labels (was 76); 104 binding atoms (was 98).

guide_response.proceed_authorization:
PROCEED authorization UNCHANGED from base verdict + supplement-1. Two prerequisites still pending:
1. Init pointer revision committed in the same docs-only commit as this supplement-2 (per LA directive). The init pointer revision folds in n2(a)-(f) amendments at the relevant sections.
2. LA pre-prep checklist completed per REVISED prep-3 (on-demand elevated PowerShell capability confirmed) + other prep items (1, 2, 4, 5, 6, 7) UNCHANGED.
Stage 4 EA-8 spawn happens AFTER both prerequisites complete + LA-explicit "go" signal.

next_action_for_la.step_1: Review this supplement-2 + the revised init pointer (committed in the same docs-only commit). Particular attention: - g8-ea8_n2(a) — Item 4.0 narrowed kill block; confirms LA prep-2 attestation is honored before vikunja_mcp kill. - g8-ea8_n2(c) — Item 4.7 paste-relay carve-out; confirm the emitted block matches LA's expected paste-relay UX. - g8-ea8_n2(d) — REVISED prep-3 attestation line; confirm replacement language is correct.
next_action_for_la.step_2: Per existing stop-and-wait gate, signal one of: - "approve EA-8 spawn" → Guide-#8 produces paste-ready EA-8 spawn message + final pre-prep checklist confirmation request. - "revise supplement-2" + change request → Guide-#8 re-authors and re-commits before spawn. - "investigate " → Guide-#8 defers spawn pending further investigation.
next_action_for_la.pause_state_note: Fleet remains paused (UNCHANGED). state.json sha256 byte-identical baseline preserved.
